data.title: Boosters and Onboarding QA
data.description: Validate booster effects, costs, acquisition sources, and first-use tutorial flow.

data.title: Core Gameplay QA
data.description: Validate snake movement, wrong taps, lives, win, fail, and revive behavior.

data.title: Daily and Competitive QA
data.description: Validate daily engagement loops and tournament liveops behavior.

data.title: Level Elements QA
data.description: Validate board scale, walls, Black Holes, and element extensibility rules.

data.title: UI, Infrastructure, and LiveOps QA
data.description: Validate screen inventory, layout variants, cloud services, analytics, remote config, and notifications.
